title: CurieAPI
description: A Simple API to handle all kinds of radiation.
body:
Simple radiation API, to make your minecraft experience way more radiating with all kinds of particles.



big thanks to ItsToastCraft (rewrite of the mod, item model/s), PoolloverNathan (further rewrite), Quintexial (mob model/s, raytracing help), Jepril (textures) and uhh that's all I think?
